programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet the loveable loners of the animal kingdom. Moose, Black Rhinos, Leatherback Sea Turtles, Platypus, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a step back into the past, and get a unique behind the scenes tour of the famous Hearst Castle in California. Stephen Hearst, the great grandson of William Randolph Hearst gives Jack the grand tour of the family ranch.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Once known as the breadbasket of Africa, Zimbabwe is home to some of the most iconic wildlife on the continent. But, drought, poaching, and a lack of resources have left many species fighting for survival.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wet & Wild
programme.desc: Bring your towel along for today’s wet and wild adventure! From the biggest fish in the sea, the whale shark, to sea lions, sperm whales, tiger sharks, and more. Find out which is number one, as Jack becomes your guide to the mysteries of the deep!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the survival secrets of crafty prey species. Wildebeest, Zebra, Wombats, Poison Dart Frogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Camouflage Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he’s counting down ten of his favorite encounters with the masters of camouflage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family are visiting a few of the special people that are doing their part to make a difference. From protecting the world's largest land mammal to the fastest…check out the story of the Knysna Elephant Park and Cheetah Outreach Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack pays a nostalgic visit to Central Florida where he got his start as a zoo director thirty years ago. Through old film clips and personal reminisces, Jungle Jack recalls his days at the one and a half acre Sanford Zoo.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he joins some very fortunate creatures on their journeys back to the wild, like Koalas, Big Horn Sheep, Alligators, Grizzly Bears, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle for six daring adventures with the King of Beasts! From Lion Cubs in Kenya and rare White Lions in South Africa to a once-in-a-lifetime walk with lions in Zambia, come along for six daring adventures with the ultimate big cats.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathaleen travel to a remote island in the Canadian Province of British Columbia to catch sight of the rare “Spirit Bear,” an all-white Black Bear. Kathaleen also takes a behind the scenes tour of a floating lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is counting down his most unbelievable big fish stories from beneath the waves!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as meets creatures battling back and returning to the wild. Manatees, Bald Eagles, Sea Turtles, Crowned Cranes and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family brave the unpredictable weather and visit the beautiful islands of Fiji. A trip to see red-footed boobies quickly turns into a sea snake-infested island expedition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is lacing up his hiking boots and heading into the woods in search of creatures that flourish in the forest. Come along and meet cassowaries, forest elephants, koalas, bats and orangutans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Travel with Jack, and his wife Sue, to beautiful Cape Town as they discover how South Africa's wildlife is faring in the big city! Then they hit the beach to hang out with a breeding colony of African Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Ever wonder what Jack's favorite animal encounters have been? Get ready to dive with the great white and meet it face-to-face. It's all part of the fun when Jack chooses his favorites on the next Animal Adventures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dirty Half-Dozen
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of the earthiest creatures in the world. Mud-loving elephants, nesting gators, burrowing penguins, sand-dwelling bee-eaters and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Riskiest Adventures
programme.desc: Join Jack for some of his favorite moments of heroism, bravery and lunacy, as he counts down his riskiest animal encounters ever. Sharks, alligators, lions and cobras are just a few of the animals joining in on this Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Today the mammals are taking over the Earth, sky, sea and even the Wild Countdown studio! Join Jungle Jack as he counts down some special mammal species that have adapted to thrive in unique ways, like orcas, camels, marsupials, platypus and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family search everywhere for chimpanzees in Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest. They get up close and personal with some colobus monkeys and Jack meets an old friend who is pioneering a conservation effort for the local women.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Horses
programme.desc: Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing equine experiences! From a horseback safari in Botswana and a dude ranch in Montana to retirement home for horses in Florida, Jack is saddling up for ten incredible horse encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack behind the scenes for some of his most memorable moments like getting pecked by an ostrich, tangling with a snake, taking fashion advice from a Samburu warrior, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits the exciting city of Los Angeles, where he meets up with some new friends, including his good pal Betty White! Come along as Jack makes a visit to a talk show with animals in tow.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as heads to the frontlines of wildlife conservation and meets the warriors working to save endangered species. Elephants, Rhinos, Bongo, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animals and Traditions
programme.desc: Today, meet Kenya’s Masai cattle herders, Thailand’s mahouts and their elephants, the cowboys down south in South America, plus many more cultured creatures on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Supreme Survivors
programme.desc: Whether it’s braving rough seas, extreme temperatures or rugged terrain, or knowing how to outwit an enemy, the creatures on today’s countdown are supremely adapted to survive the extremes.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The vivacious Hannah Harvye (Mary Martin) immediately becomes involved with the crew and rekindles a romance with an old flame. An unassuming man (Ben Murphy) finds himself in a tight situation with a maid he's never met. Gopher saves a man's life.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Glamour and dancing feet hit the deck in the season premiere as "The Love Boat" Mermaids join the crew for fun and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Vicki experiences difficulty with the tough manager of the music group The Temptations when she tries to get them to perform for passengers. A loan shark offers a customer a bizarre deal. Also, Captain Stubing becomes involved in a kidnapping.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Andy Warhol makes an appearance on the 200th episode of The Love Boat in which a woman tries to avoid Warhold, a man and his wife search for a valuable stamp, and Ace gets upset about his wages.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The crew and passengers encounter love, adventure, and romance during a cruise to the Riviera.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The crew and passengers encounter love, adventure, and romance during a cruise to the Riviera.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a fantasy flashback, Gopher sees the cruise ship transformed into a World War II troop carrier bound for France, with the Nazis plotting to torpedo the vessel before it arrives.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Cruise
programme.desc: Doc marries a younger woman only to run into his ex-wife while on his honeymoon. Meanwhile, a voluptuous diet doctor hires a svelte fitness instructor to impersonate her, and a man has to tell his partner their relationship may be over.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Lauren Tewes returns as Julie McCoy Chenault on board for a reunion cruise with the gang while her husband is away on business. In order to get a job as an assistant purser, Ace must make some difficult decisions.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Sandy Dennis makes a rare television appearance as a woman who meets the most unusual man. Vicki and Judy find that sharing sleeping quarters can threaten a friendship.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A wedding aboard the ship is fraught with problems when the father of the bride faces bankruptcy and the best man woos the bride's sister despite her father's objections.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Ace becomes involved with a spy and his daughter. A professional daredevil finds life can get even more dangerous when he meets a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Stakes are high when members of the group must go on a heroic rescue mission in a previously known location.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group is spread thin with some members holding down the church and the others on a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: New enemies disregard rules and morals; although Rick wants to find a peaceful agreement, the enemies seem to prefer a more violent resolution.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After facing all of the recent trials, a slight detour may offer the solution that the group has been seeking.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group feels beaten after living life on the road, but must continue to trudge along in spite of the changes they have incurred.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After withstanding a spectacular storm, Rick and the others meet what appears to be a friendly person, but find themselves mistrustful.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While trying to secure a new home, Rick and his group face challenges, and question the utopia they find themselves in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When life within the walls begins to mimic life outside, the group realizes that sheltered life may not be possible.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others have a difficult time assimilating into Alexandria; a new threat arises that could bring the group closer together.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When it appears that things are starting to normalize in the settlement, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo espera, desesperadamente, el regreso de Shane que se encuentra atrapado en una escuela, rodeado por los zombis. Daryl y Andrea buscan a alguien en el bosque.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane hace un sacrificio mortal que provoca un comportamiento extraño y autodistanciamiento. El resto del grupo intenta resistir en un punto medio entre vivir para morir y morir por vivir.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Preocupados por su seguridad, el grupo idea un plan, uno con el que Hershel no está para nada de acuerdo. Él deja bien claro que el grupo puede quedarse por ahora, pero no de forma indefinida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn, el único que rompe barreras entre ambos grupos, sabe mucho más de lo que le gustaría. Daryl descubre una señal de vida y, en su delirio, intenta regresar vivo a la granja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se cuentan y se revelan secretos. Hershel se niega a reconocer la nueva realidad del mundo. Andrea sale de su coraza. Todos están más y más conscientes de que "todo es alimento para algo".

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y los demás tratan de restablecer el orden después de un descubrimiento terrible. Hershel retoma un viejo hábito y desaparece, Rick y Glenn deben seguirlo a la ciudad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Atrapados, Rick, Hershel y Glenn luchan por sobrevivir contra nuevos enemigos, tanto muertos como vivos. Shane encuentra a Lori en peligro en el camino y se impone la misión de llevarla de vuelta a la granja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Shane entran en conflicto por el destino de un extraño. Andrea ayuda a la hija menor de Hershel a enfrentar una decisión de importancia crucial.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se pone del lado de Shane en una decisión importante, haciéndole pensar a Dale que el grupo está perdiendo humanidad. Las acciones de Carl tienen consecuencias no planeadas para el grupo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo se entera de que alguien peligroso puede andar suelto cerca de la granja. A medida que cae la noche, Rick, Shane, Daryl y Glenn revisan a fondo el bosque para manejar la situación y mantener al grupo a salvo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Carl encuentran la granja en peligro; el grupo está dividido y en estado de caos; se cuestiona el liderazgo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El mundo es cada vez más peligroso, el embarazo de Lori avanza y Rick descubre un refugio potencialmente seguro. Pero primero deberá asegurar las instalaciones y llevar al resto del grupo al límite.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras un evento traumático, una vida pende de un hilo. Para complicar aún más las cosas, el grupo deberá además enfrentar una probable amenaza en este nuevo entorno.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de ser testigos de un accidente, Andrea y Michonne llegan a una nueva comunidad de sobrevivientes. A medida que se producen conflictos con sus nuevos compañeros, deben tomar una decisión.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet moves in with Mrs. Roper while Mr. Roper is away on business, then stews about Jack and Chrissy being alone for the night in the trio's upstairs apartment.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy, whose skills in the kitchen aren't exactly sharp, invites a gourmet to share a home-cooked dinner, then pleads with Jack to be her secret stand-in-chef.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Terrestrial Defense Force presumed that incidents of human disappearing is done by alien, and sent out the elite team "Ultra Guard" for investigation. However, a mysterious wanderer appeared in front of Furuhashi and Soga.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Ultra Guard member Ishiguro is back from Space Station V3. Dan sent him home and found Tilsonite 808, something that does not exist in Earth, in Ishiguro's yard. That night, incidents of people being attacked happened one after another.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Dan and Furuhashi headed towards Kisodani for investigation of a mysterious object that fell down. The object was found out to be a spaceship, and a girl from the spaceship stole Dan's Ultra Eye.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Nuclear Ship Max, the most advanced scientific research ship of TDF, went on an investigation of the serial ship disappearing incidents. However, NS Max disappeared as well! The vanished ships were sent into space by Alien Godola...

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: World-famous scientist Professor Yushima came to Japan, on a trip to attach the Yushima Diode to the TDF Far East Base. However, Professor Yushima has already been brainwashed by Alien Vira!

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: A black shadow appeared in Anne's private room. The shadow told Anne that he was an alien, but had no intention to harm humans. At the same time, a message was sent from Outer Space City Pegassa, saying that they had a system trouble.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: A mysterious monster appeared and attacked citizens one by one. The criminal was identified to be the atrocious criminal 303 from Planet Quraso, who broked the prison of his home planet and escaped to Earth.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: Daigo finds a strange man who wants to buy a monster. The man was told to see Director Eiji Tsuburaya about anything concerning monster, and disappears into a mysterious light.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: Daigo is plagued by nightmares of the world being swallowed up by darkness. Then Monster Zoiger appears from ancient ruins as if to make this nightmare a reality. GUTS deploys, but are troubled by the super-fast Zoiger.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: The world is thrown into chaos when Zoiger appears all over the Earth. Then the powerful demon, Gatanothor, emerges from beneath ancient ruins with plans to shroud the planet in darkness. Is humanity doomed to being swallowed up into darkness?

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: Tiga is defeated! As people mourn, GUTS executes a plan to use a Light Gene Converter developed by Evil Tiga Masaki to convert the power of the Maxima Overdrive into a beam and save Tiga who has been turned back into a stone statue by Gatanothor!

programme.title: Ultraman X

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!
